reason: setuptools package_index RCE; pinned to setuptools==78.1.1 in requirements but ECR scan detects older copy bundled in uv or the Lambda base image's pip, which cannot be patched via requirements.

glib GString memory management flaw on very large strings; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.

OpenSSL ASN1_TYPE type confusion in PKCS7_digest_from_attributes; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
CVE details not yet published; present in NVIDIA CUDA base image, no fix available in AL2023 repo.
